channel.title: Jürgen Jacobsen - Projects
channel.description: Latest projects and blog posts from Jürgen Jacobsen

item.title: Hello World
item.description: This is the first post to my list of projects. It is a simple example for this page, further development will be done in the future. Stay tuned for more updates and projects!

item.title: Archivum.md
item.description: This is my first actual Go application built with Wails and React with the goal of having a light weight fast desktop app for markdown editing.

item.title: TLD Helper
item.description: An interactive CLI tool to explore domain extensions. It allows you to fetch domain extensions and WHOIS information.
